title: Fresh Textures PvP
description: PvP version of the Fresh Textures resource pack
body:
**Fresh Textures × PvP** — is a resource pack designed specifically for PvP gameplay. This version focuses on improved visibility, cleaner textures, and optimized details to give players a competitive advantage without losing the original style. It keeps the familiar Fresh Textures atmosphere while enhancing clarity, performance, and overall combat experience.

### It is recommended to use the resource pack as shown in the photo below:

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d83a5eff831cb9ea8cfa44190e0903d69a36ab.png)


## ⭐ Features
The main features of the resource pack:
* Fullbright
* No Fog
* No Water and Lava Overlay
* Small totem, shield and spear
* Overlay Remover (pumpkin blur, vignette, fire, nausea)
* Low Fire
* No heart blinking
* Removed some particles
* Red outlines around dangerous blocks
* Cleaner hitboxes (f3+b)
* Clean glow effect
* Transparent shield, totem, fire


## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
